title: Strength and Conditioning Coach
description:
Strength Clinic Academy is a physiotherapy and personal training centre located in Singapore’s central business district. With over 20 years of collective experience, our team is dedicated to creating a supportive environment where both staff and clients can thrive.

We are looking for a qualified Strength & Conditioning Coach who is passionate about helping others achieve their health and fitness goals. This role offers the chance to work alongside a motivated team, while enjoying flexibility in your schedule and opportunities for professional growth.

Requirement:

  • Certified Strength and Conditioning Coach with a recognised certification (e.g., NSCA CSCS, NASM PES, ACSM, or similar accredited program).

  • Bachelor’s degree in Exercise Science, Sports Science or a related field.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of practical coaching experience in strength and conditioning, athletic performance, or rehabilitation settings.

  • Willing to continuously learn and expand knowledge in exercise science, athletic performance, and rehabilitation.

  • Passionate about health, fitness, and helping others achieve their goals.

Tasks:

  • Develop personalised fitness programs that cater to each client's unique goals, needs, and health conditions, ensuring a tailored approach to their fitness journey.
  • Closely monitor the client's progress, provide motivation and encouragement to keep them committed and on track to achieving their fitness goals.
  • Educate on proper form to prevent injury and promote effective workouts.
  • Maintain a clean, safe, and welcoming workout environment for everyone.

We offer a base salary along with a great commission structure. We will also provide healthcare insurance and a professional course allowance.

If all that sounds like an ideal position for you, we would love to hear from you!

Please send a CV and brief introduction about yourself to hr@strengthclinicacademy.com.

Looking forward to hear from you!

postedCompany.description:
Our Integrated Approach is a synergistic solution designed to help you advance more efficiently towards your best body through the combination of  Physiotherapy, Personal Training and Customised Nutrition. Yes, a combination, because one simply cannot be without the other.


Strength Clinic Academy’s Integrated Approach is a proprietary method designed to support total body transformation. Simply put, we will help you build, maintain, and repair your body. The Integrated Approach ensures that you have a team of physiotherapists, personal trainers and nutritionists supporting you every step of the way.


We believe this is the most efficient and effective way to keep moving forward in your fitness journey.
postedCompany.name: SCA 2021 PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
